# NCUpdateResult.failed

**Case**

The update attempt failed.

## Declaration

```swift
case failed
```

## Constants

- **NCUpdateResult.newData**: The update resulted in new data to display.
- **NCUpdateResult.noData**: The update did not result in any new data since the last update.

items.description: The update resulted in new data to display.
